WKSH.settings.install.name: Module content
WKSH.settings.install.label: Install / reinstall content
WKSH.settings.install.hint: Creates the folder and the 3 crafting macros in this world (in the world's language).
WKSH.install.title: Crafting Workshops — Setup
WKSH.install.prompt: Install the crafting macros (lightsaber, potions & talismans, tuning) into this world?
WKSH.install.promptHint: You can reinstall at any time from Configure Settings → Sabacc & Workshops.
WKSH.install.gmOnly: Only the GM can install the content.
WKSH.common.assignCharacter: Assign yourself a character (right-click the actor → Assign) or select your token.
WKSH.settings.enrich.name: Repair / enrich equipment
WKSH.settings.enrich.label: Open the repair tool
WKSH.settings.enrich.hint: Makes existing weapons' and armor's attachment/crystal sheets readable and their activated mods actually work. Safe and revertible.
WKSH.enrich.title: 🛠️ Repair / enrich equipment
WKSH.enrich.intro: Repairs weapons and armor already in play: adds readable descriptions to their crystals/accessories and correctly applies their activated mods to the profile.
WKSH.enrich.note: Only touches items carrying recognized attachments. Backs up the original (Revert available).
WKSH.atelier.title: ⚒️ Crafting Workshop
WKSH.atelier.intro: What do you want to craft or modify?
WKSH.atelier.li.tune: Weapon / Armor: install attachments or activate their mods.
